generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow American who values our nation's security, I've been concerned about how our allies are taking advantage of our generosity. Did you know that some NATO members are only spending 1% of their GDP on defense? Meanwhile, our brave troops are stretched thin protecting everyone. It's time we make sure our allies pull their weight. #StrongAlliances #FairShare
